case_title: WAHIDI, FREED VS PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES (PIA)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-15-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-07-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY WAHIDI, FREED AS TO DEFENDANT PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES (PIA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO M. SHEIKH MGR PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL AIRLINE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAHIDI, FREED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAKISTAN INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES (PIA) $130.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $151.00, PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED A CHECK FOR $30. FROM DEFT. WHICH HE MAY CASH & APPLY TO THE ABOVE PRINCIPAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
